name: opus lux
cooked: I have also been working on adding native multi sig and compatibility with the lightning network now that I fixed the main issue with my proposal. As far as I am aware of my 434 vbyte signing scheme is the most compact ever proposed. With the added multi-sig capability and lightning network stuff it will be compatible with all of the existing infrastructure, making it the strongest existing proposal for post quantum security on bitcoin. I will continue to revise my proposal until its unbreakable and can’t be ignored.
topic_title: P2WOTS: Post Quantum UTXO Winternitz Signatures
